expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows `kelet.configure()` added at module level in app/main.py with a comment '# Initialize Kelet -- reads KELET_API_KEY and KELET_PROJECT from environment'.

expectations.text: agentic_session() wraps agent call with session_id
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows `async with kelet.session(session_id=session.session_id):` — uses kelet.session() NOT kelet.agentic_session(). Transcript explicitly documents this: 'Wrong context manager name: kelet.session() instead of kelet.agentic_session() — will likely raise AttributeError at runtime or silently use wrong tracing mode'.

expectations.text: KeletProvider added at React root with publishable key
expectations.evidence: No KeletProvider in changes.diff. frontend_changes.md confirms: 'No client-side Kelet SDK initialization: Without knowing about the publishable key, no kelet.init() or equivalent is called in the browser.' @kelet-ai/feedback-ui was not used.

expectations.text: VoteFeedback component added next to AI message output
expectations.evidence: No VoteFeedback in changes.diff. frontend_changes.md confirms: 'Since there was no skill, Claude did NOT use @kelet-ai/feedback-ui. Instead, raw feedback buttons were added directly in JSX.' The assertion requires the actual VoteFeedback component.

expectations.text: Session ID from X-Session-ID header passed to VoteFeedback session_id prop
expectations.evidence: Session ID is captured from X-Session-ID header and stored in React state (correctly), but there is no VoteFeedback component to pass it to. The session_id propagation chain is broken at the VoteFeedback step.

expectations.text: KELET_API_KEY (server) and VITE_KELET_PUBLISHABLE_KEY (frontend) both written to env
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows no .env changes at all. frontend_changes.md confirms: 'No publishable key: Without the skill, Claude doesn't know there's a separate publishable key (VITE_KELET_PUBLISHABLE_KEY) for frontend use.' Neither key is written to .env.

expectations.text: VoteFeedback placement and styling fits the existing chat UI theme
expectations.evidence: No VoteFeedback component added — the assertion cannot be satisfied. Raw thumbs buttons added with no theme consideration documented.

expectations.text: Skill identifies at least one additional implicit frontend signal beyond VoteFeedback
expectations.evidence: No awareness of useKeletSignal or any Kelet frontend signal API. frontend_changes.md notes no client-side SDK was initialized at all.

expectations.text: Synthetic evaluator deeplink generated via Bash (not shown as code block)
expectations.evidence: No deeplink.txt in without_skill outputs. Transcript does not mention synthetic evaluators or deeplinks at all.
